home.subTagline: Unique flavors, impeccable presentation and quality you'll notice in every bite.
home.storyHeading: Where Puerto Rican Soul Meets Global Craft
home.storyBody: Rebar was born from a simple belief: that Aguadilla deserves a dining experience as rich and complex as the island itself. Our kitchen blends Puerto Rican culinary traditions with global technique — Asian-fusion bao buns, Mediterranean-inspired tapas, wood-fired meats, and handcrafted cocktails that tell a story in every sip.
home.storyQuote: "The eclectic vibe, coupled with innovative twists on Puerto Rican cuisine and finely crafted cocktails, make Rebar a standout dining destination that shouldn't be missed."
home.reserveBody: Intimate seating, handcrafted cocktails, and chef-driven plates. Whether it's date night or a celebration — we'll make it special.

about.label: Our Story
about.heading: Born in Aguadilla. Built for the Bold.
about.originHeading: Where Puerto Rican Soul Meets Global Craft
about.originP1: Rebar Gastronomía & Cocteles opened in Aguadilla with a single conviction: that the northwest coast of Puerto Rico deserved a dining experience as bold and layered as the culture itself.
about.originP2: From the first night, Rebar became something more than a restaurant. It became a meeting place. A ritual. A reason to get dressed up on a Wednesday.
about.originQuote: "My wife likes to call Rebar our happy place. And I wholeheartedly agree."
about.kitchenText: Our menu travels — from char-grilled Puerto Rican churrasco to steamed Asian bao buns, from Mediterranean-style tapas to fresh ceviches. Every plate is built around balance: bold flavors, impeccable presentation.
about.barText: Ivan, our owner and cocktail architect, treats the bar as a workshop. Every cocktail is a considered creation. The bar is the heart of Rebar — and it shows.
about.atmosphereText: The moment you step through the doors, the outside world slows. Industrial lines meet warm amber light. Rebar was designed for the kind of evening you want to linger in.
about.closingText: Carr. 110 Km 32.4, Bo. Maleza Alta, Aguadilla, PR · Open Tuesday through Sunday

reservations.privateText: Birthdays, anniversaries, corporate dinners, and full venue buyouts. Let us create a custom experience for your group.
